title: Setup Wizard + Website + Templates
description: Walkthrough of the LaunchSteady setup wizard, website editor, and template selection.

fields.label: Business name
fields.hint: Typed into the business name field in the wizard

fields.label: Tagline
fields.placeholder: Fresh baked with love every day
fields.hint: Short one-liner shown below your business name

fields.label: Main headline
fields.placeholder: Freshly baked, delivered to your door
fields.hint: The big bold text visitors see first on your website

fields.label: Supporting text
fields.placeholder: Artisan sourdough and pastries made fresh every morning.
fields.hint: One or two sentences below the main headline

fields.label: About section heading
fields.hint: Title of the About Us section on your website

fields.label: About body text
fields.placeholder: We started in 2019 with one oven and a love for good bread.
fields.hint: A short paragraph about your business
